incidents.title: Flash flood near River Edge
incidents.summary: Storm-drain sonar reports a rapid inflow surge near the retention basin and river-adjacent drain spine.

aiAssessment.predictedImpact: Localized curb flooding could affect river-edge access roads within 10 minutes.
aiAssessment.recommendation: Dispatch AirSweep for pressure diversion, inspect the drain spine, and route runoff away from housing.

incidents.visualSummary: A blue flood pocket shows where water is pooling, and the wave front traces where runoff is pushing next.
incidents.publicNote: The city is diverting flow and protecting the river-edge block while drain pressure is reduced.
worklog: AirSweep Unit 02 advanced repair mission to 45%.
AirSweep Unit 02 dispatched by AI orchestrator.
Edge anomaly streamed into the digital twin.
AI classified event as flood with high urgency.

incidents.title: Transit corridor fracture detected
incidents.summary: Surface vision and axle-vibration nodes found a crack line spreading across the main transit lane.

aiAssessment.predictedImpact: Pothole formation and lane slowdown are likely during the next heavy load cycle.
aiAssessment.recommendation: Send Road Rover to print a temporary composite patch and stabilize the lane edge.

incidents.visualSummary: Dark seam lines mark the spreading crack while the highlighted lane shows the repair envelope.
incidents.publicNote: Autonomous lane repair is underway and transit impact is being kept local.
worklog: Road Rover 07 advanced repair mission to 62%.
Road Rover 07 advanced repair mission to 41%.
Road Rover 07 dispatched by AI orchestrator.
Edge anomaly streamed into the digital twin.
AI classified event as roads with high urgency.

incidents.title: Burst main under Peninsula Public School
incidents.summary: Pressure mesh and subsurface acoustic sensors indicate a fast-rising rupture directly below the school approach.

aiAssessment.predictedImpact: Water loss and lane washout risk could disrupt the school frontage within 12 minutes.
aiAssessment.recommendation: Dispatch PipeBot, isolate the branch valve, and hold a school perimeter until pressure stabilizes.

incidents.visualSummary: A blue pressure bloom and spray spokes show where the underground main is breaking beneath the school frontage.
incidents.publicNote: The city has placed the school frontage into protective response mode while the main is isolated.
worklog: Verification mesh confirms the affected system returned to safe baseline.
PipeBot 11 completed repair and safety verification.

incidents.title: Pollution spike near East Stack Factory
incidents.summary: Air quality towers and stack telemetry caught a sudden particulate jump near the primary factory exhaust path.

aiAssessment.predictedImpact: AQI could exceed 145 in nearby blocks within 15 minutes if the source is not neutralized.
aiAssessment.recommendation: Launch the mapping drone, verify the source, and position AirSweep downwind for neutralization.

incidents.visualSummary: A translucent plume shows where particulates are drifting, while floating sample points show where the drone is validating air quality.
incidents.publicNote: The system is containing the emissions spike and tracking downwind spread in real time.
worklog: Verification mesh confirms the affected system returned to safe baseline.
